qa_pair.question: List all cubes whose name starts with "}" (control cubes) and report the count.
For the cube named "}ClientProperties", how many dimensions does it have?
Which TI process is invoked by the most chores in the system? Report the process name. If multiple tie, report any one.
Identify all TI processes whose Prolog code references the function "ItemReject". Report the count.
For the dimension "}Clients" (hierarchy "}Clients"), how many leaf-level Numeric-type elements does it contain?
Across all cubes that have rules, find the one with the largest number of rule statements (ruleCount, not lineCount). Report the cube name.
Among all chores, how many are currently active (toggle on)?
Validate the references of TI process "}bedrock.cube.create" - does the process compile cleanly with no missing object references? Answer "yes" or "no".

Using TI source-code analysis, count the processes that are neither called by any other (non-control) process nor call any other process themselves (call-graph orphans, control processes excluded as both source and target). Report the count.
For the cube "SalesCube", check whether the coordinate (Time=2024, Region=Germany, Measure=Revenue) is writable. The cube does not exist on this instance — answer "not found".
